name: WishlistButton
usage_hint: Heart icon button that toggles wishlist/favorites for a product. Thin wrapper around WishlistButton primitive.
when_to_use: On product cards, product pages, or anywhere users can save items for later. Syncs state to localStorage or backend wishlist service. Can be sized (sm/md/lg) and styled via className.
when_not_to_use: When wishlist functionality isn't implemented in your store. For compare lists (different feature). When you need custom wishlist UI (use the primitive directly instead).
anti_patterns: Passing both productId and variantId when only productId is needed (wishlist is product-level, not variant-level)
Multiple WishlistButton instances for same product on one page (they sync, but wasteful)

examples.label: Small wishlist icon for product cards
Large wishlist button with variant tracking
